svg.text: Type II · Type III · Type I
acceptance and rejection before cortical processing
nor a place taste waits unchanged
Descending forebrain modulation of taste-responsive brainstem activity
Primate ascending route: NTS → VPMpc → insular–opercular cortex
Rodent route via obligatory parabrachial relay
Parallel NTS output to consummatory brainstem circuits

The receptor → brainstem → thalamus → cortex sequence is the main ascending road, not the entire network. Rodent and primate routes are drawn together for comparison; they are not two parallel pathways within one brain.
